Item.Text: FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: VDIAG
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: Software Version (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Vehicle Identification Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: ECU serial number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Calibration Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: Temperature_Level 1
Data.Comment: First Alert temperature threshold

Data.Name: Temperature_Level 2
Data.Comment: Second Alert temperature threshold

Data.Name: VmaxActLock
Data.Comment: 4GRIP Speed limit to keep the LOCK_DRIVE_MODE activated.

Data.Name: Vmaxlock
Data.Comment: Threshold to go in Auto mode from Lock without cutomer request

Data.Name: Vmax4x4
Data.Comment: 4GRIP Speed limit to manage the GEP ON (4WD_Mode)

Data.Name: Vrenclock
Data.Comment: 4GRIP speed threshold to reactivate automaticaly the LOCK_Operative_Mode

Data.Name: Vreenauto
Data.Comment: 4GRIP speed threshold to reactivate automatically the AUTO_Operative_Mode

Data.Name: VmaxAnticipation
Data.Comment: Max speed to applied the Anticipation strategy

Data.Name: VminAnticipation
Data.Comment: Min speed to applied the Anticipation strategy

Data.Name: Waiting_Time_After_Overcurrent_Detection
Data.Comment: Waiting time applied by the ECU before to supply the pump after an overcurrent detection

Data.Name: Undercurrent_Threshold
Data.Comment: Current threshold to detect leakage on motodifferential

Data.Name: Undercurrent_Time_Detection
Data.Comment: Undercurrent time see by the ECU to detect an external leakage

Data.Name: Waiting_Time_After_Undercurrent_Detection
Data.Comment: Waiting time applied by the ECU before to supply the pump after an undercurrent detection

Data.Name: Undercurrent_Detection_Number
Data.Comment: Number of overcurrent detection cycle before cut the definitively during the journey

Data.Name: u_AccelOffThrs
Data.Comment: The accelerator pedal position value must be higher than or equal to this value to be in required d

Data.Name: Umin_AfterSV_default
Data.Comment: Voltage threshold (min) to authorize 4-GRIP function after voltage defaultV

Data.Name: Umax_AfterSV_default
Data.Comment: Voltage threshold (max) to authorize 4-GRIP function after voltage default

Data.Name: Umin_AfterIGN_default
Data.Comment: Voltage threshold (min) to authorize 4-GRIP function after IGN default

Data.Name: Umax_AfterIGN_default
Data.Comment: Voltage threshold (max) to authorize 4-GRIP function after IGN default

Data.Name: Tsensor_confirmation_timeout
Data.Comment: Period during which the ECU has to detect a default on the T° sensor before stopping the 4-GRIP func

Data.Name: SwitchTransientPositionTimeout
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm FC_SWITCH_TRANSIENT fault.

Data.Name: SwitchRequestDelay
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm that switch position has changed

Data.Name: Supply_voltage_def_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of bus off before the ECU stops the 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: uyr_MaxRelAcc
Data.Comment: Maximal lateral acceleration for limitation of estimated YawRate value

Item.Text: 0- Yaw rate computed by the ECU 4GRIP
1- Yaw rate CAN parameter from the Braking system.

Data.Name: m_RTRD
Data.Comment: track width

Data.Name: Tire Perimeter
Data.Comment: Wheel dimension for conversion RPM to Km/h in the model

Data.Name: WheelBase
Data.Comment: Wheelbase : distance between front and rear axles

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: P_fix_ECUKeepAliveTImeout
Data.Comment: Timeout to ensure E² handling and ROM check before ECU 4GRIP shutdown.

Data.Name: SLIP_DETECTION_LEVEL_1
Data.Comment: Slipping threshold to activate the GEP in AUTO_Operative_Mode from Auto_Driver_mode

Data.Name: SLIP_DETECTION_LEVEL_2
Data.Comment: Slipping threshold to activate the GEP in AUTO_Operative_Mode from LOCK_Driver_Mode

Data.Name: SLIP_DETECTION_LEVEL_1_EXIT
Data.Comment: Slipping threshold to deactivate the GEP in AUTO_Operative_Mode from Auto_Driver_mode

Data.Name: LIMIT_TIME_GEP_ON_VEHICLE_STOPPED
Data.Comment: The maximum time to manage the GEP when the vehicle doesn't move

Data.Name: RawSensorAnticipationThreshold
Data.Comment: Threshold of Pedal Acceleration position value to activate the Anticipation strategy

Data.Name: LOCK_Max_Duration_without_Slip
Data.Comment: Timer value to disengage the GEP if no slip is detected in Lock mode

Data.Name: Overcurrent_Threshold
Data.Comment: Current threshold to detect a pump blocked

Data.Name: Overcurrent_Time_Detection
Data.Comment: Overcurrent time see by the ECU to detect an overcurrent

Data.Name: Overcurrent_Detection_Number
Data.Comment: Number of overcurrent detection cycle before cut the definitively during the journey

Data.Name: P_fix_Switch2WDPosition
Data.Comment: Corresponds to V_SwitchPosition value for 2WD position

Data.Name: P_fix_Switch4WDLockPosition
Data.Comment: Corresponds to V_SwitchPosition value for 4WD Lock position

Data.Name: P_fix_SwitchAutoPosition
Data.Comment: Corresponds to V_SwitchPosition value for Auto position

Data.Name: P_fix_SwitchIncoherentPosition
Data.Comment: Corresponds to V_SwitchPositionRaw value for Incoherent pattern

Data.Name: P_fix_SwitchInvalidPosition
Data.Comment: Corresponds to V_SwitchPosition value for Invalid position

Data.Name: P_fix_SwitchIncoherentPositionTimeout
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm FC_SWITCH_INCOHERENT fault.

Data.Name: P_fix_SwitchTransientPosition
Data.Comment: Corresponds to V_SwitchPositionRaw value for Transient position

Data.Name: P_fix_SwitchRequestDelay
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm that switch position has changed

Data.Name: P_fix_SwitchStuckPositionTimeout
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm FC_SWITCH_STUCK fault

Data.Name: P_fix_SwitchTransientPositionTimeout
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm FC_SWITCH_TRANSIENT fault

Data.Name: P_fix_IgnitionOn
Data.Comment: Corresponds to V_Ignition value for Ignition On

Data.Name: P_fix_Powerlatch_timeout
Data.Comment: Timeout for the powerlatch mode

Data.Name: P_fix_s_TimeStep
Data.Comment: Solver time step

Data.Name: P_sys_s_VehicleSpeedTauFilter
Data.Comment: Time constant used for Vehicle Speed filtering

Data.Name: P_fix_kmphps_DefVehSpdMaxIncRt
Data.Comment: 18 = 5*3.6, Maximal Increase rate of vehicle speed

Data.Name: P_fix_kmphps_DefVehSpdMaxDecRt
Data.Comment: 18 = 5*3.6, Maximal Decrease rate of vehicle speed

Data.Name: P_sys_x_AxleSlipNotchFilter_1
Data.Comment: "1st coefficient of InterAxleSlip Notch filter % Coef1*z^2 + Coef2*wn*z + Coef3...

Data.Name: P_sys_x_AxleSlipNotchFilter_2
Data.Comment: 2nd coefficient of InterAxleSlip Notch filter % Coef1*z^2 + Coef2*wn*z + Coef3...

Data.Name: P_sys_x_AxleSlipNotchFilter_3
Data.Comment: 3rd coefficient of InterAxleSlip Notch filter % Coef1*z^2 + Coef2*wn*z + Coef3...

Data.Name: P_sys_x_AxleSlipNotchFilter_4
Data.Comment: 4th coefficient of InterAxleSlip Notch filter % Coef1*z^2 + Coef2*wn*z + Coef3...

Data.Name: P_sys_x_AxleSlipNotchFilter_5
Data.Comment: 5th coefficient of InterAxleSlip Notch filter % Coef1*z^2 + Coef2*wn*z + Coef3...

Data.Name: P_sys_s_InterAxleSlipTauFilter
Data.Comment: Time constant used for Inter Axle Wheel Speed filtering

Data.Name: P_fix_kmph_VehicleSpeedMax
Data.Comment: Maximal vehicle speed

Data.Name: P_fix_kmph_VehicleSpeedMin
Data.Comment: Minimal vehicle speed

Data.Name: P_tng_kmph_MinVehSpeedForPSD
Data.Comment: The vehicle speed must be higher than or equal to this value to be in required driving conditions

Data.Name: P_tng_Nm_MaxFrontAxleTrqForPSD
Data.Comment: The estimated Front Axle Torque must belower than or equal to this value to be in required driving

Data.Name: P_fix_pct_PSDAverageSlipMax
Data.Comment: This is the maximum value of PSD average slip (output of PSD calculation stateflow)

Data.Name: P_fix_pct_PSDAverageSlipMin
Data.Comment: This is the minimum value of PSD average slip (output of PSD calculation stateflow)

Data.Name: P_tng_s_MinTimeForPSD
Data.Comment: The required driving conditions must be verified during at least this detection time

Data.Name: P_tng_x_MaxCounterForPSD
Data.Comment: This is the maximum value of PSD counter for PSD warning flag set

Data.Name: P_tng_x_MinCounterForPSD
Data.Comment: This is the maximum value of PSD counter for PSD warning flag reset

Data.Name: P_tng_pct_MinWheelSlipForPSD
Data.Comment: The average wheel slip (during the detection time) must be higher than this value to increment PSD c

Data.Name: P_tng_pct_WheelSlipHystForPSD
Data.Comment: The average wheel slip (during the detection time) must be lower than MinWheelSlipForPSD minus this

Data.Name: P_tng_kmph_MaxDeltaSpeedForPSD
Data.Comment: The delta vehicle speed (during the detection time) must be lower than this value to be in required

Data.Name: P_tng_pct_MaxDeltaSlipForPSD
Data.Comment: The delta wheel slip (during the detection time) must be lower than this value to be in required PSD

Data.Name: P_tng_x_PSDSlipUpdateEnabled
Data.Comment: This flag is used to enable/disable the control logic linked to the update of AUTO slip target (but

Data.Name: P_fix_pct_PSDUpdatedSlipMax
Data.Comment: This is the maximum value of PSD updated slip (output of PSD update stateflow)

Data.Name: P_fix_pct_PSDUpdatedSlipMin
Data.Comment: This is the minimum value of PSD updated slip (output of PSD update stateflow)

Data.Name: P_fix_pct_PSDDeltaUpdatedSlip
Data.Comment: The delta between 2 successive values of the updated slip must be lower than this value to update th

Data.Name: P_fix_pctps_PSDSlipMaxIncRate
Data.Comment: This value is the maximum decrease rate of updated slip

Data.Name: P_fix_pctps_PSDSlipMaxDecRate
Data.Comment: This value is the maximum increase rate of updated slip

Data.Name: P_sys_s_ThrotPositionTauFilter
Data.Comment: To filter the Throttle position Parameter.

Data.Name: LockSwitchStuckPositionTimeout
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm FC_SWITCH_STUCK fault

Data.Name: P_tng_x_PSDEnabled
Data.Comment: This flag is used to enable/disable the PSD control logic

Data.Name: Neg_Slip_Authorised
Data.Comment: Configuration to activate or deactivate the activation of EPU due to a negative slip.

Item.Text: 0- No activation of EPU with a negative slip
1- Activation of EPU with a negative slip authorised

Data.Name: DISENGAGEMENT_DIRECTION_TIMING
Data.Comment: Time to manage the pump in the opposite direction in order to deactivate the 4WD mode

Data.Name: FRONT_REVERSE_WAITING_TIME
Data.Comment: Time applied when the ECU change the pump direction = Min_Duration_EPU_Switch_State

Data.Name: ENGAGEMENT_DIRECTION_TIMING
Data.Comment: The mimimun time to manage the pump after GEP control starting.

Data.Name: Four_WD_AVAILABLE_AFTER_THERMPROTECT
Data.Comment: Temperature minium to re-establish the Auto or Lock_Operative_Mode

Data.Name: Exit_SafeState_confirmation_timing
Data.Comment: Period during which the voltage has to be acceptable before re-use of 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: IGN_def_confirmation_timeout
Data.Comment: Period during which IGN has to be not acceptable before stopping the 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: ComFP_OverCurrent_confirmation_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of OC or SC on the front pump before stopping the 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: ComFP_confirmation_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of Overcurrent on the front pump before stopping the 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: ComRP_OverCurrent_confirmation_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of OC or SC on the rear pump before stopping the 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: ComRP_confirmation_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of Overcurrent on the rear pump before stopping the 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: CAN_def_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of default detected on CAN before stopping the 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: CAN_VB_off_default_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of bus off before the ECU stops the 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: ASRFailure_confirmation_timeout
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm that ASR is in failure

Item.Text: 0- Factory mode – AUTO and Lock modes are disabled.
3- Default value when delivered to plant

Data.Name: DetectionLeakeageStrategy
Data.Comment: Configuration to activate or deactivate the Leakeage detection strategy.

Data.Name: ASRInFailure_Configuration
Data.Comment: Configuration to activate or deactivate the consideration of ASR failure

Item.Text: 0- ASR in failure not taken into account
1- ASR in failure taken into account
fGRIP ECU SW takeover EPU activation
fGRIP ECU SW takeover operative mode
Lost Communication with ECM on Vehicle CAN
Lost Communication with BCM on Vehicle CAN
Lost Communication with VDC on Vehicle CAN
Lost Communication with USM on Vehicle CAN

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DTCFaultDetectionCounter
Data.Comment: DTC fault detction counter

Data.Name: CAN_V_BCM_def_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of default on BCM frames before ECU reactivity

Data.Name: CAN_V_USM_def_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of default on USM frames before ECU reactivity

Data.Name: CAN_V_VDC_def_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of default on VDC frames before ECU reactivity

Data.Name: CAN_V_ECM_def_timeout
Data.Comment: Period of default on ECM frames before ECU reactivity

Data.Name: UminOOR
Data.Comment: Voltage threshold (min) to authorize 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: UmaxOOR
Data.Comment: Voltage threshold (miax to authorize 4-GRIP function

Data.Name: SwitchInvalidPositionTimeout
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm FC_SWITCH_INVALID fault.

Data.Name: T_read_min
Data.Comment: Min acceptable temperature read from the temperature sensor

Data.Name: Internal_Failure_timeout
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm an internal failure

Data.Name: NotConfig_timeout
Data.Comment: Timeout to confirm a not configurated ECU failure

Data.Name: T_read_max
Data.Comment: Max acceptable temperature read from the temperature sensor

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection counter counter for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip only on PHEV projects only on PHEV projects

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip only on PHEV projects

Device.Name: Lost Communication with VDC on Vehicle CAN
Lost Communication with USM on Vehicle CAN
Lost Communication with BCM on Vehicle CAN
Lost Communication with ECM on Vehicle CAN
fGRIP ECU SW takeover operative mode
fGRIP ECU SW takeover EPU activation
